commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR centralizes public publisher visibility checks, hides missing/deleted/deactivated personal publishers from profile, catalog, member, and list endpoints, adds a `/user/:handle` loader 404, expands regression tests, and adds real-browser proof guidance to `AGENTS.md`.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of current main shows profile lookup only gates on the publisher row, while the PR proof shows the fixed route returning 404 for a deleted-user fixture and 200 for an active fixture.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow repair can add the missing `specs/security-moderation.md` invariant; maintainers still need to accept or revise the bounded public-list read path before merge.

target.title: fix: hide banned user publisher profiles
target.body:
## Summary

- hide public personal publisher profiles when their linked user is missing, deleted, or deactivated
- cover legacy no-link personal publishers by resolving active owner membership before public visibility
- make `/user/:handle` SSR/client loader 404 when `api.publishers.getProfileByHandle` returns null
- add backend regression coverage for profile, published/starred lists, display manifests, members, and public publisher pagination/counting
- update `AGENTS.md` to require screenshot proof from a real running ClawHub instance in a real browser, not generated mockups/cards

## Real Browser Proof

Captured from a locally running ClawHub instance in this PR worktree:

- Frontend: `http://127.0.0.1:3000`
- Local Convex backend: `http://127.0.0.1:4210`
- Fixture used: local-only `proofSeed:seedBannedPublisherProfileProof`, then cleared after capture

`/user/joelchance` fixture: active personal publisher row linked to a deleted user. Result: HTTP 404 and ClawHub not-found page.

![Real local ClawHub screenshot: /user/joelchance returns 404](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/openclaw/clawhub/qa-artifacts/pr-proof/fix-banned-user-profiles/real-browser/real-local-banned-user-404.png)

`/user/proof-active-builder` fixture: active personal publisher linked to active user. Result: HTTP 200 and normal publisher profile.

![Real local ClawHub screenshot: active user publisher profile returns 200](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/openclaw/clawhub/qa-artifacts/pr-proof/fix-banned-user-profiles/real-browser/real-local-active-user-profile.png)

Machine-readable capture summary: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/openclaw/clawhub/qa-artifacts/pr-proof/fix-banned-user-profiles/real-browser/summary.json

## Tests

- `bunx vitest run convex/publishers.test.ts src/__tests__/user-route-loader.test.ts src/components/PublishedItemCard.test.tsx`
- `bun run format:check -- convex/publishers.ts convex/publishers.test.ts src/routes/user/\$handle.tsx src/__tests__/user-route-loader.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `bun run ci:static`
- `bun run ci:unit`
- `bun run ci:types-build`

## Autoreview

- `$autoreview` found and I fixed accepted findings around list pagination/counts, route-level Convex client import side effects, and legacy no-link personal publishers.
- Final Codex autoreview attempts exited nonzero without actionable finding text; fallback reviewers were unavailable (`claude`: low credits, `droid`: auth missing). The final diff passed the focused and full gates above.
target.author: patrick-erichsen

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
